title: Diamond Energy Pty Ltd — Consumer harm
investigation_objective: Diamond Energy Pty Ltd paid $46,950 in penalties across three ACCC infringement notices for breaching the Electricity Retail Code, after admitting that in June 2024 it sent price-change communications to 12,809 customers that failed to include mandatory pricing information (including the lowest possible price). The ACCC also accepted a court-enforceable undertaking under which Diamond Energy committed to update its price-change notification templates and implement a compliance program.
scope: Paid $46,950 across three ACCC infringement notices for alleged Electricity Retail Code breaches; Admitted failing to include mandatory pricing information in communications sent to 12,809 customers; Gave the ACCC a court-enforceable undertaking to update notification templates and implement a compliance program
